description.ko: 유동적이고 자연스러운 역동성과 생체 발광 유기 구조를 통해 표현된 AURA-7의 의식을 시각적으로 탐구하며, 디지털 생명과 리드미컬한 생물학 사이의 간극을 메웁니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of AURA-7's consciousness expressed through fluid, natural dynamics and bioluminescent organic structures, bridging the gap between digital life and rhythmic biology.

prompt: AURA-7 as a fluid, biological entity integrated with nature, flowing translucent silk-like membranes, pulsating bioluminescent veins, organic curves, swirling liquid golden energy, macro cellular patterns, soft ethereal lighting, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, serene and rhythmic atmosphere.
